chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 985 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.02.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Applicant present in person Ms. Sana Memon APG Mr. Ahmed Faqueer Panhwar Advocate files his vakalatnama on behalf of Complainant. The Complainant, injured and the applicant are all present. The Complainant and the injured categorically state that they have forgiven the applicant and that they have no objection if the bail is confirmed. Section 324 PPC is compoundable offence; hence the interim pre-arrest bail of the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
